chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Bail Application No.337 of 2026 [Aqib @ Akro v. The State] ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ For hg of Bail Application 18.02.2026. Mr. Tahir-ur-Rehman, advocate for applicant. Ms. Rubina Qadir, Deputy Prosecutor General. After arguing the bail application at some length, learned defence counsel does not press this bail application and seeks directions to the trial court to expedite the trial, which has not been opposed by learned D.P.G. In view of above, this bail application is dismissed as not pressed. The trial court is, however, directed to expedite the trial, examine material witnesses and conclude it within two months without fail, after which in any case, the applicant would be at liberty to repeat his bail application, which will be decided on its own merits. The Cr. Bail Application stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE HANIF
